consolidated.headline: Core system healthy. Prop pipeline verified sound — the 'no prop trades' was market conditions (SOL/ETH range-bound + chop), not the notification consolidation. Shadow-prop 'orphaned' mislabeling fixed (PR #6103). ETF pullback cells backtest-confirmed edge — no demotes.

operator_priorities.title: Prop pipeline healthy — no missed trades
operator_priorities.detail: Last real prop ticket 2026-07-06 (eth_pullback_2h ETH long), filled + closed 07-08 at SL (-$78.76), clean report-back; reconcile 0 unacted. All 4 live prop strategies evaluate every bar but SOL/ETH have been range-bound (Donchian no-breakout) / chop (ADX ~20, no pullback setup) — no entry setup. Notification consolidation (#5967) only touched the monitor pulse; emit path byte-identical. Nothing missed.

operator_priorities.title: Shadow-prop 'orphaned' mislabeling — FIXED
operator_priorities.detail: Shadow _prop variants' order-packages were mis-swept 'orphaned' on /prop/tickets. execute_pkg dry branch now stamps status='shadow'. PR #6103 (CI green, draft). Removes a real source of future prop-investigation confusion.

operator_priorities.title: ETF pullback cells backtest-confirmed edge — KEEP
operator_priorities.detail: gld_pullback_1h + qqq_pullback_1h looked like the worst paper losers (0/9, 0/7) but 9yr net-of-fee backtest shows strong robust edge (GLD +113.6R/exp+0.32; QQQ +90.7R/exp+0.34; both +8/10 years incl. 2024-2026). Live paper 0-win is small-sample + artifact closes. Demote hypothesis REJECTED — kept live.

operator_priorities.title: alpaca_live underfunded (gld_pullback dispatch refusals)
operator_priorities.detail: alpaca_live balance $149.61 / avail $55.93 can't size GLD (~$376/share) -> recurring 'sized_qty=0' dispatch warning. Operator chose leave-as-is. Not an error (paper leg still places); account-funding issue, orthogonal to strategy edge.

operator_priorities.title: SOL/AVAX alt cells lagging on paper — keep soaking
operator_priorities.detail: sol/avax pullback_2h + trend_donchian_avax_4h are the persistent per-symbol laggards (SRQ-20260618 cohort); ETH/ADA/XRP siblings net-positive over 30d. Operator chose keep soaking; SRQ items refreshed with 07-10 evidence.

cross_review_notes: The 'paper bleed' framing resolves to variance + oversized paper notional + artifact-contaminated closes, NOT broken strategies. On a risk-normalized (R) basis the 30d paper book is roughly flat (+6.6R).

The two cells that looked worst on live paper have the STRONGEST backtested edge — a caution against demoting on thin live-paper samples without a backtest gate. 'Backtest first' (operator) was the correct call.
Prop is a third funding class, isolated from real/paper KPIs; its silence this window is setup-availability, not a wiring fault.

real.note: 7d proxy for the ~2-day since-last window (exact 2-day real closes were sparse). Lifetime -$26.26.

paper.note: 7d demo window. NOTE: 30d demo is only -$2.6k over 173 trades at +6.6R (near-flat risk-adjusted) — the 7d $ figure is a handful of large-notional losers (trend_donchian_avax_4h -$3.7k/0-3, trend_donchian_ada_4h -$2.1k [but +$2.9k over 30d = variance]). Large paper position sizing amplifies $ swings; R-metrics are the truer read.
